data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of syncing back to the main booking system, but there is no evidence in the prior steps that confirms this functionality. The linked use case explicitly states the need for this sync, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or confirmations related to this requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of syncing back to the main booking system.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
